# Agent Memory — Coding Vault

Shared memory system for Dwayne Primeau's AI coding agent fleet. All agents read and write here to maintain continuity across sessions, projects, and agents.

## Start Here

- CONTEXT.md: Consolidated context — read this first. Auto-generated from source files.
- NOW.md: Current fleet state — active work, blockers, recent decisions, last-seen timestamps.
- MEMORY.md: Full index with links to all individual memory files.
- AGENT-SETUP.md: How agents connect, sync architecture, per-agent instructions, rules.
- ACTIVITY.md: Append-only activity log. All agents write here. Source of truth for NOW.md.

## Vault Owner

- Name: Dwayne Primeau
- Role: Entrepreneur, school principal, agentic engineer
- Preferred language: Rust (when possible), TypeScript (frontend), Python/Shell (scripts)
- Working directory: /Volumes/M2 Media/Coding Dwayne/Claude

## Folder Structure

- User/ — Dwayne's preferences, role, working style
- Feedback/ — How Dwayne wants work done (do's and don'ts per agent)
- Project/ — Active projects and context
- Agents/ — Per-agent profiles and capabilities
- Reference/ — External systems, dashboards, infrastructure pointers
- activity-archive/ — Monthly archives of ACTIVITY.md

## Active Agents

- claude-code: Primary agent, Mac, iCloud direct access
- codex: Skill/plugin creation, Mac, iCloud direct
- goose: Quick tasks, code analysis, Mac, iCloud direct
- kimi: Browser automation, desktop, Mac, iCloud direct
- kiro: IDE-integrated, Mac, iCloud direct
- hermes: VPS fleet orchestrator, reads/writes via GitHub sync
- antigravity: Projects workspace (skills, mobile, web, OpenClaw agents)

## Sync

- GitHub repo: https://github.com/dman1313/agent-memory-coding (private — source of truth for VPS agents)
- Mac agents: Read/write directly to iCloud path. launchd pushes to GitHub every 15min via sync.sh.
- VPS agents: git clone https://github.com/dman1313/agent-memory-coding.git /home/ubuntu/agent-memory — pull before reading, push after writing. Cron syncs every 15min.
- Latency: changes visible to all agents within 15 minutes of being written.

## How to Write a Memory

1. Check MEMORY.md — update existing file if topic exists, don't create duplicates
2. Use correct folder: User/, Feedback/, Project/, Reference/, or Agents/
3. Frontmatter required: name, description, metadata.type
4. Use [[wikilinks]] to link related memories
5. Update MEMORY.md index after writing

## Activity Log Rules

Every agent must log to ACTIVITY.md at session start and end:
- session-start: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ | agent-name | session-start | project-slug | Starting: intent
- session-end: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ | agent-name | session-end | project-slug | Done: summary
- Also log: decision, blocker, blocker-resolve, milestone, handoff, note events as they happen
- Prepend only (newest at top). Never edit or delete existing lines.
- After 5+ entries, regenerate: bash build-context.sh
